_meta.source: client bins (boostsets/powers/clientmessages-en), extracted with Bin Crawler
_meta.attuned_note: Effectiveness does not vary as Security Level changes
_meta.render: substitute {Boost.Attrib.X.Scale} with the piece's level-scaled boost value (MultIO math, engine-identical)

pieces.title: Gladiator's Strike: Damage/Accuracy
pieces.help_template: Enhances the damage of a power by {Boost.Attrib.Damage.Scale}% and accuracy by {Boost.Attrib.Accuracy.Scale}%. NOTE: This is a PvP enhancement, this type of enhancement has two groups of set bonuses. You get the set bonuses not marked "(PvP)" while experiencing PvE content, but you get both the PvP set bonuses and the PvE set bonuses when fighting players.

pieces.title: Frozen Blast: Recharge/Chance for Immobilize
pieces.help_template: UNIQUE -- No more than 1 enhancement of this type may be slotted by a character. Gives the slotted power a chance to immobilize targets of this power, and reduces the power's recharge time by {Boost.Attrib.RechargeTime.Scale}%. This enhancement's chance to trigger is equal to approximately 2.5 times per minute.

Enhances the accuracy of a power by {Boost.Attrib.Accuracy.Scale}%, enhances the hold duration of a power by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}%, the hold duration by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}%, the immobilization duration by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}%, the sleep duration by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}%, the fear duration by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}% and the confuse duration by {Boost.Attrib.Mez.Scale}%. This enhancement can only be slotted by Controllers and may be slotted into most control powers.

pieces.title: Superior Kheldian's Grace: Recharge/Form Empowerment
pieces.short: Increases Attack Rate, Kheldian Form Bonus
pieces.help_template: UNIQUE -- No more than 1 enhancement of this type may be slotted by a character. This enhancement boosts the effectiveness of the Kheldian's various forms. While in human form they will benefit from enhanced damage resistance, while in Nova form they will deal greater damage and while in Dwarf form their maximum health will be increased. Additionally, this enhancement reduces recharge time by {Boost.Attrib.RechargeTime.Scale}%. This enhancement can only be slotted by Peacebringers and Warshades and may be slotted into any of their damage powers.

pieces.title: Cupid's Crush: Damage/Chance for Confuse
pieces.help_template:
UNIQUE -- No more than 1 enhancement of this type may be slotted by a character. Enhances damage by {Boost.Attrib.Damage.Scale}%. Gives a small chance to confuse your target. This effect will trigger roughly 2.5 times per minute.

The magnitude of the confuse effect may increase based on the number of Cupid's Crush enhancements slotted into the same power. Slotting the full set will add a 20% chance of an even greater confuse effect.
